IRIS-HEP Topical Meetings


IRIS-HEP topical meetings cover one or more presentations involving IRIS-HEP researchers or from related research areas. They are typically held Mondays 17:30 GVA and Wednesdays 18:00 GVA. Vidyo connections are always available and meetings are usually recorded. Find all topical meeting agendas here.

July, 2021
  • 14 Jul, 2021 - Tiled: A Service for Structured Data Access
  • 7 Jul, 2021 - IRIS-HEP Fellow presentations
June, 2021
  • 30 Jun, 2021 - IRIS-HEP Fellow presentations
  • 28 Jun, 2021 - IRIS-HEP Fellow presentations - (Watch the meeting recording)
  • 21 Jun, 2021 - Automatic Differentiation in C++ and Cuda
  • 2 Jun, 2021 - IRIS-HEP Fellow presentations - (Watch the meeting recording)
May, 2021

  • 10 May, 2021 - HL-LHC R&D and IRIS-HEP Fellow presentations - (Watch the meeting recording)
April, 2021
  • 21 Apr, 2021 - FAIR Framework for AI in HEP + ILC Software/Computing - (Watch the meeting recording)
  • 7 Apr, 2021 - Mini-Workshop: Differentiable Programming for High-Performance, Data-Intensive Computations
March, 2021
  • 31 Mar, 2021 - HL-LHC R&D topics: FastCaloSim + End-to-End Deep Learning in Reco - (Watch the meeting recording)
  • 29 Mar, 2021 - HL-LHC R&D topics: iDDS + Atlas release testing - (Watch the meeting recording)
  • 24 Mar, 2021 - HL-LHC R&D topics: Running FastCaloSim on GPU + ACTS - (Watch the meeting recording)
  • 3 Mar, 2021 - HL-LHC R&D topics: Hyperparameter Optimisation + Random # generation - (Watch the meeting recording)
  • 1 Mar, 2021 - HL-LHC R&D topics: Graph NNs for Tracking + Sherpa - (Watch the meeting recording)

This project is supported by the National Science Foundation under Cooperative Agreement OAC-1836650. Any opinions, findings, conclusions or recommendations expressed in this material are those of the authors and do not necessarily reflect the views of the National Science Foundation.
